name: clasp-it
description: Pick any element on any webpage and send its full context (HTML, CSS, React props, console logs, network requests, screenshot) to Claude Code, Cursor, or Windsurf via MCP — in one click.

auth.description: API key from Clasp-it extension settings or https://claspit.dev

installInstructions.claudeCode: claude mcp add --scope user --transport http clasp-it https://claspit.dev/mcp --header "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY"

tools.name: get_element_context
tools.description: Get the most recently picked element context (HTML, CSS, React props, console logs, network requests, screenshot). Auto-marks the pick as in_progress.

tools.name: get_element_context_by_id
tools.description: Get a specific pick by its ID.

tools.name: list_recent_picks
tools.description: List the last N element picks with their status (not_started, in_progress, completed).

tools.name: update_pick_status
tools.description: Mark a pick as not_started, in_progress, or completed.

tools.name: clear_context
tools.description: Clear all picks for the current user.

free.description: 10 picks/day, DOM + CSS selector + computed styles

pro.description: Unlimited picks + screenshot, console logs, network requests, React props
